div.class: card p-4 position-relative border border-white rounded-4 property-card-container

div.div: Unit No.
UDAN
Zone
Ward
Colony
Property Id

t.t-value: property.survey_line_ids and property.survey_line_ids[0] and property.survey_line_ids[0].latitude is not None and property.survey_line_ids[0].longitude is not None and property.survey_line_ids[0].latitude != '' and property.survey_line_ids[0].longitude != ''
lat != '1.2' and lng != '1.1' and lat != '0.0' and lng != '0.0' and float(lat) != 0.0 and float(lng) != 0.0

'Check out this property on UDAN!' + '%0A%0A' + property_url + '%0A%0A📍 Location: ' + lat + ', ' + lng + '%0A🗺️ View on Map: ' + maps_url + '%0A🚗 Drive: ' + directions_driving + '%0A🚶 Walk: ' + directions_walking + '%0A🚌 Transit: ' + directions_transit
'Check out this property on UDAN!' + '%0A%0A' + property_url
'Check out this property on UDAN!' + '%0A%0A' + property_url
'Check out this property on UDAN!' + '%0A%0A' + property_url

div.style: max-width: 420px; overflow:visible; border:3px solid var(--primary-brown); box-shadow:0 2px 16px 0 rgba(139,69,19,0.10);

div.div: Your DIGIPIN

img.style: position:absolute; bottom:10px; right:10px; height:70px; width:auto; z-index:2; background:transparent; box-shadow:none;

div.class: card p-4 position-relative border border-white rounded-4 property-card-container

div.div: Property Images

div.class: card p-4 position-relative border border-white rounded-4

div.div: Government Payment Services

div.class: card p-4 position-relative border border-white rounded-4

div.div: Emergency Services

div.class: card p-4 position-relative border border-white rounded-4

div.div: Know Your Officers

t.t-if: property.zone_id == officer.zone_id and property.ward_id == officer.ward_id and officer.is_active or officer.is_global

div.class: card p-4 position-relative border border-white rounded-4

div.style: background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent-brown) 0%, var(--primary-brown) 100%); font-size: 1.1rem; border-radius: 18px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(139,69,19,0.10);

div.div: Frequently Asked Questions
What is UDAN?
UDAN is a digital address code that uniquely identifies any location in India, making navigation and service delivery easier and more precise.
How is UDAN different from a regular postal address?
UDAN is based on latitude and longitude, ensuring accuracy even in areas without formal addresses, unlike traditional postal addresses.
Why do we need UDAN when we already have postal addresses?
UDAN provides a precise, digital way to locate properties, especially useful in areas with ambiguous or missing addresses.
Is UDAN available offline?
UDAN can be accessed online, but you can save or print your UDAN for offline use.
Can UDAN be used for navigation?
Yes, UDAN can be used with navigation apps to find precise locations.
Will my postal address change if I use UDAN?
No, your postal address remains the same. UDAN is an additional digital identifier.
How is a UDAN generated for a specific location?
UDAN is generated using the latitude and longitude of the location.
Is my personal address data stored in UDAN?
No personal data is stored in the UDAN itself; it is a code representing a location.
Can UDAN be used for rural or remote areas?
Yes, UDAN is especially useful in rural or remote areas where formal address systems may not exist.
How precise is the UDAN system?
UDAN is highly precise as it is based on GPS coordinates.
What is the difference between pincode and UDAN?
Pincode refers to a postal region, while UDAN is unique to a specific location or property.
Is UDAN applicable only within India?
Currently, UDAN is designed for use within India.
What is the benefit of UDAN in emergency situations?
UDAN helps emergency services reach your exact location quickly and efficiently.
How do I find my UDAN?
You can find your UDAN using the official portal or by contacting your local municipal office.
Do I have to login or signup for finding UDAN?
No login or signup is required to find your UDAN.
How does UDAN help in government services?
UDAN enables accurate delivery of government services and correspondence to your location.
How does UDAN handle changes in infrastructure, such as new buildings or roads?
UDAN can be updated to reflect changes in infrastructure, ensuring continued accuracy.
Can a building having multiple residents/homes have different UDAN?
Yes, each unit or home within a building can have its own unique UDAN.
Will UDAN replace traditional addresses?
UDAN is meant to supplement, not replace, traditional addresses.
Can UDAN be useful for rural villages?
Yes, UDAN is especially beneficial for rural villages lacking formal address systems.
How do I fetch or decode a UDAN?
You can fetch or decode a UDAN using the official UDAN portal or app.
Does UDAN work in areas with no internet access?
UDAN can be used offline if you have already saved or printed your code, but online access is needed for updates.
Is UDAN secure?
Yes, UDAN is secure and does not store personal information.
Will UDAN affect my privacy?
No, UDAN does not contain or reveal any personal data.
How can businesses benefit from UDAN?
Businesses can use UDAN for accurate deliveries, customer verification, and service reach in both urban and rural areas.

div.style: background: var(--off-white); box-shadow: 0 2px 16px 0 rgba(139,69,19,0.08); border: none !important;

div.div: Disclaimers

"DigiPIn"™ is a trademark of the Department of Posts, Government of India. The usage of the DIGIPIN / India Post logo on this portal is solely to identify India Post's open-source DigiPIn functionality. Sambhaji Nagar Municipal Corporation has implemented the publicly available logic as provided by the Department of Posts. The Corporation is not responsible for any disconnected data, outdated content, or broken links displayed here.

Property and other records shown here are updated from the latest available municipal data. For corrections or updates—such as ownership, dimensions, addresses, etc.—please contact the Corporation or the Assistant Revenue Officer (ARO). Any decisions based on this information are at the user's own risk.
This project is being undertaken by Sambhaji Nagar Municipal Corporation

Designed and Implemented by
Redmelon Business Solutions Pvt Ltd
